title: Validator Result
description: Output of a validator run on a candidate response. Decides whether the response is admissible, what action is required, and what gap was identified.

passed.description: Whether the candidate response passed validation as-is.

reasons.description: Reasons supporting the decision. Each reason should be a short, citable assertion.

claim_strength_assessed.description: Validator's assessment of the response's claim strength.

evidence_strength.description: Validator's assessment of evidence supporting the claims.

gap_identified.description: Description of any gap between claim_strength and evidence_strength. Triggers downgrade.

recommended_revision.description: If decision is trim/rewrite/regenerate, the recommended revision strategy.
